da.hero_subtitle: Spørgsmål om sessioner, private events eller partnerskaber? Vi er klar til at hjælpe.
da.info_hours_text: Sessioner efter booking. Kontakt os for ledige tider.
da.rent_text: Vibro Yoga-studiet kan lejes til private events, firmaevents, workshops og særlige lejligheder. Kontakt os for priser og tilgængelighed.

en.hero_subtitle: Questions about sessions, private events, or partnerships? We’re here to help.
en.info_hours_text: Sessions by booking. Contact us for available times.
en.rent_text: The Vibro Yoga studio is available for private events, corporate events, workshops, and special occasions. Contact us for pricing and availability.
